title: TypeScriptCodeGenerationConfig
description: V2 configuration for TypeScript code generation (entity definitions, form typings, OptionSet constants, SDK message names, Custom API wrappers)

type.description: Config type discriminator. Must be 'typescript' for TypeScript code generation.

version.description: Config version. V2 configs use the typed discriminator model.

entities.description: Entity logical names to include in generation. Expanded at runtime by 'entityMask' and 'solutions'.

solutions.description: Solution unique names. Entities from these solutions are added to 'entities'.

entityMask.description: Wildcard pattern (e.g. 'contoso_*') to auto-include matching entities.

language.description: Language code for label localization. 0 = user language (default), or an explicit LCID (e.g. 1033).

requests.description: SDK message names to generate (actions, custom APIs, built-in messages like WhoAmI). Used for SDK message name constants and Custom API typed wrappers.

globalOptionSets.description: Global OptionSet logical names to generate as standalone constants.

onlyFormsFromSolutions.description: Only generate forms that belong to the configured solutions.

include.description: Controls which optional sections are included in generated TypeScript code.

businessProcessFlows.description: Business process flow unique names to generate.

entityFilters.description: Entity-level attribute filters for TypeScript generation.

entityRefFilters.description: Entity reference attribute filters for TypeScript generation.

entityFormFilters.description: Entity form filters for TypeScript generation.

EntityFilter.title: EntityFilter
EntityFilter.description: Filter configuration for entities (shrink imports, e.g. odata query or form open)

entity.description: Logical name of the entity to filter.
Logical name of the entity to filter references for.

include.description: Whether this is an include or exclude filter.

entity.description: Logical name of the entity to filter forms for.

include.description: Whether this is an include or exclude filter.
